---
title: "Lab 3: CSS Styling & Responsive Design"
date: "February 9-26, 2026"
due-date: "February 26, 2026"
---

# Lab 3: CSS Styling & Responsive Design

## Objectives

By completing this lab, you will:

:::{.callout-note}
## Learning Outcomes
- Master CSS selectors and apply advanced styling techniques
- Create professional color schemes and typography
- Build responsive layouts that adapt to different screen sizes
- Implement responsive images and media
- Practice Bootstrap framework integration
- Create accessible and well-structured CSS
:::

---

## Pre-Lab Preparation

Before starting this lab, ensure you have:

:::{.callout-tip}
## Required Setup
- Completed Labs 1 and 2 (HTML foundation)
- A code editor (VS Code recommended)
- Knowledge of basic CSS (from Lectures 7-11)
- Understanding of HTML structure
- A local file server for testing
:::

**Test your setup:**
```bash
cd your-lab-folder
python -m http.server 8000
# Visit http://localhost:8000 in browser
```

---

## Part 1: Color Scheme & Typography

### Objectives
- Create a professional color palette
- Implement custom fonts
- Establish typography hierarchy

### Step 1: Color Palette Definition

Create a file `css/colors.css` with your color variables:

```css
:root {
    /* Primary Colors */
    --primary-color: #2563eb;
    --primary-light: #3b82f6;
    --primary-dark: #1e40af;
    
    /* Secondary Colors */
    --secondary-color: #10b981;
    --secondary-light: #34d399;
    --secondary-dark: #059669;
    
    /* Neutrals */
    --text-dark: #1f2937;
    --text-light: #6b7280;
    --bg-light: #f9fafb;
    --bg-white: #ffffff;
    --border-color: #e5e7eb;
    
    /* Status Colors */
    --success: #10b981;
    --warning: #f59e0b;
    --danger: #ef4444;
    --info: #3b82f6;
}
```

### Step 2: Typography System

```css
/* Font Import */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600&display=swap');

/* Base Typography */
:root {
    --font-primary: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    
    --font-size-base: 1rem;
    --font-size-sm: 0.875rem;
    --font-size-lg: 1.125rem;
    --font-size-xl: 1.25rem;
    --font-size-2xl: 1.5rem;
    --font-size-3xl: 1.875rem;
    --font-size-4xl: 2.25rem;
}

/* Heading Styles */
h1 {
    font-size: var(--font-size-4xl);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.2;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

h2 {
    font-size: var(--font-size-3xl);
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

h3 {
    font-size: var(--font-size-2xl);
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-dark);
}

/* Body Text */
p {
    font-size: var(--font-size-base);
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: var(--text-light);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

/* Code */
code {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    background-color: var(--bg-light);
    padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
    border-radius: 3px;
    color: var(--danger);
}

pre {
    background-color: #1f2937;
    color: #f3f4f6;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 0.5rem;
    overflow-x: auto;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

pre code {
    color: inherit;
    background: none;
    padding: 0;
}
```

### Your Task: Part 1

Create a color palette CSS file with:
- ✅ At least 10 CSS color variables
- ✅ Google Fonts integration (2+ font families)
- ✅ Complete typography hierarchy (h1-h6, p, small)
- ✅ Code snippet styling
- ✅ Link styling

---

## Part 2: Advanced Selectors & Styling

### Objectives
- Use complex CSS selectors
- Create pseudo-class effects
- Build styled components

### Create `css/components.css`

```css
/* Buttons - Multiple States */
.btn {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0.5rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.btn-primary {
    background-color: var(--primary-color);
    color: white;
}

.btn-primary:hover {
    background-color: var(--primary-dark);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
}

.btn-primary:active {
    transform: translateY(0);
}

.btn-secondary {
    background-color: var(--secondary-color);
    color: white;
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
    background-color: var(--secondary-dark);
}

/* Cards */
.card {
    background: var(--bg-white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: 0.5rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.card:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    border-color: var(--primary-color);
}

.card-header {
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    background-color: var(--bg-light);
}

.card-body {
    padding: 1.5rem;
}

.card-footer {
    padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
    background-color: var(--bg-light);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

/* Forms */
.form-group {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.form-label {
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-dark);
}

.form-control {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: 0.4rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-family: inherit;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.form-control:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: var(--primary-color);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1);
}

.form-control::placeholder {
    color: var(--text-light);
}

/* Alerts */
.alert {
    padding: 1rem;
    border-radius: 0.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
}

.alert-success {
    background-color: #d1fae5;
    color: #047857;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--success);
}

.alert-danger {
    background-color: #fee2e2;
    color: #991b1b;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--danger);
}

.alert-warning {
    background-color: #fef3c7;
    color: #92400e;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--warning);
}

.alert-info {
    background-color: #dbeafe;
    color: #1e40af;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--info);
}

/* Navigation */
.nav {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2rem;
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.nav-link {
    color: var(--text-light);
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 0.5rem 0;
    border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.nav-link:hover {
    color: var(--primary-color);
    border-bottom-color: var(--primary-color);
}

.nav-link.active {
    color: var(--primary-color);
    border-bottom-color: var(--primary-color);
    font-weight: 600;
}

/* Tables */
table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

thead {
    background-color: var(--bg-light);
}

th {
    padding: 1rem;
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border-color);
}

td {
    padding: 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

tbody tr:hover {
    background-color: var(--bg-light);
}
```

### Your Task: Part 2

Create `css/components.css` with styled components:
- ✅ Button states (normal, hover, active, disabled)
- ✅ Card component with hover effects
- ✅ Form elements with focus states
- ✅ Alert/notification styling (4 types)
- ✅ Navigation with active states
- ✅ Table styling

---

## Part 3: Responsive Layout

### Objectives
- Create mobile-first responsive design
- Implement flexible grid layouts
- Use media queries effectively

### Create `css/layout.css`

```css
/* Base Responsive Container */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0 1rem;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

@media (min-width: 640px) {
    .container {
        max-width: 640px;
    }
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
    .container {
        max-width: 768px;
    }
}

@media (min-width: 1024px) {
    .container {
        max-width: 1024px;
    }
}

@media (min-width: 1280px) {
    .container {
        max-width: 1280px;
    }
}

/* Flexbox Grid System */
.grid {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
}

/* Mobile-first spacing */
.mt-1 { margin-top: 0.5rem; }
.mt-2 { margin-top: 1rem; }
.mt-3 { margin-top: 1.5rem; }
.mt-4 { margin-top: 2rem; }

.mb-1 { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.mb-2 { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.mb-3 { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.mb-4 { margin-bottom: 2rem; }

.p-1 { padding: 0.5rem; }
.p-2 { padding: 1rem; }
.p-3 { padding: 1.5rem; }
.p-4 { padding: 2rem; }

/* Responsive Typography */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    h1 { font-size: var(--font-size-3xl); }
    h2 { font-size: var(--font-size-2xl); }
    h3 { font-size: var(--font-size-xl); }
}

/* Responsive Columns */
.col-1 { grid-column: span 1; }
.col-2 { grid-column: span 2; }
.col-3 { grid-column: span 3; }

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .col-1, .col-2, .col-3 { grid-column: span 1; }
}

/* Flexbox Utilities */
.flex { display: flex; }
.flex-center { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.flex-between { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
.flex-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.gap-1 { gap: 0.5rem; }
.gap-2 { gap: 1rem; }
.gap-3 { gap: 1.5rem; }
```

### Create `css/responsive.css`

```css
/* Header & Navbar */
.header {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    background: var(--bg-white);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    z-index: 100;
    padding: 1rem 0;
}

.navbar {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
}

.nav-toggle {
    display: none;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--text-dark);
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .nav-toggle {
        display: block;
    }
    
    .nav {
        display: none;
        position: absolute;
        top: 100%;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        flex-direction: column;
        background: var(--bg-white);
        padding: 1rem;
        gap: 0;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    }
    
    .nav.active {
        display: flex;
    }
    
    .nav-link {
        padding: 0.75rem;
        border-bottom: none;
        border-left: 3px solid transparent;
        padding-left: 1rem;
    }
    
    .nav-link.active {
        border-left-color: var(--primary-color);
    }
}

/* Responsive Images */
img {
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
}

.img-responsive {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
}

/* Responsive Video/Embed */
.video-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding-bottom: 56.25%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.video-container iframe,
.video-container video {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}

/* Responsive Tables */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    table {
        font-size: 0.875rem;
    }
    
    th, td {
        padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;
    }
}

/* Responsive Hero Section */
.hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-color), var(--primary-dark));
    color: white;
    padding: 4rem 1rem;
    text-align: center;
    min-height: 300px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

.hero h1 {
    color: white;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.hero p {
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.25rem);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto 2rem;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero {
        padding: 2rem 1rem;
    }
}
```

### Your Task: Part 3

Create responsive layout files:
- ✅ Container with responsive max-widths
- ✅ Mobile-first media queries (min-width)
- ✅ Responsive grid system (auto-fit/auto-fill)
- ✅ Flexible typography with clamp()
- ✅ Responsive images (max-width: 100%)
- ✅ Mobile navigation toggle
- ✅ Responsive tables

---

## Part 4: Build a Multi-Section Website

Create `index.html`:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>CSS Responsive Portfolio</title>
    
    <!-- CSS Files -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/reset.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/colors.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/layout.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/components.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/responsive.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Header & Navigation -->
    <header class="header">
        <div class="container">
            <nav class="navbar">
                <div class="logo">
                    <h2>MyPortfolio</h2>
                </div>
                <button class="nav-toggle" id="navToggle">☰</button>
                <ul class="nav" id="navMenu">
                    <li><a class="nav-link active" href="#home">Home</a></li>
                    <li><a class="nav-link" href="#about">About</a></li>
                    <li><a class="nav-link" href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
                    <li><a class="nav-link" href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
                </ul>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Hero Section -->
    <section id="home" class="hero">
        <div class="container">
            <h1>Welcome to My Portfolio</h1>
            <p>Discover my work and let's create something amazing together</p>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary">View My Work</button>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main class="container">
        <!-- About Section -->
        <section id="about" class="p-4">
            <h2>About Me</h2>
            <p>I'm a passionate web developer creating beautiful and functional websites.</p>
            <p>With expertise in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, I build responsive websites that work across all devices.</p>
        </section>

        <!-- Projects Section -->
        <section id="projects" class="p-4">
            <h2>Projects</h2>
            <div class="grid">
                <article class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h3>Project One</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <p>A responsive website portfolio using modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.</p>
                        <button class="btn btn-primary">View Project</button>
                    </div>
                </article>

                <article class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h3>Project Two</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <p>E-commerce site with advanced search and filter functionality.</p>
                        <button class="btn btn-primary">View Project</button>
                    </div>
                </article>

                <article class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h3>Project Three</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <p>Blog platform with Markdown support and comment system.</p>
                        <button class="btn btn-primary">View Project</button>
                    </div>
                </article>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Contact Section -->
        <section id="contact" class="p-4">
            <h2>Contact Me</h2>
            <form class="contact-form">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="name">Full Name</label>
                    <input 
                        type="text" 
                        id="name" 
                        class="form-control" 
                        placeholder="John Doe"
                        required>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="email">Email</label>
                    <input 
                        type="email" 
                        id="email" 
                        class="form-control" 
                        placeholder="john@example.com"
                        required>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="message">Message</label>
                    <textarea 
                        id="message" 
                        class="form-control" 
                        rows="5" 
                        placeholder="Your message here..."
                        required></textarea>
                </div>

                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send Message</button>
            </form>
        </section>
    </main>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <footer style="background: var(--bg-light); padding: 2rem; text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
        <p>&copy; 2026 My Portfolio. All rights reserved.</p>
    </footer>

    <script src="js/navbar.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

Create `js/navbar.js`:

```javascript
// Mobile Navigation Toggle
const navToggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
const navMenu = document.getElementById('navMenu');
const navLinks = navMenu.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');

navToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
    navMenu.classList.toggle('active');
});

// Close menu when link clicked
navLinks.forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener('click', () => {
        navMenu.classList.remove('active');
    });
});

// Update active link on scroll
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    let current = '';
    const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section');

    sections.forEach(section => {
        const sectionTop = section.offsetTop;
        if (pageYOffset >= sectionTop - 200) {
            current = section.getAttribute('id');
        }
    });

    navLinks.forEach(link => {
        link.classList.remove('active');
        if (link.getAttribute('href').slice(1) === current) {
            link.classList.add('active');
        }
    });
});
```

### Your Task: Part 4

Build the website with:
- ✅ Complete responsive HTML structure
- ✅ All CSS files properly linked
- ✅ Header/navbar with mobile toggle
- ✅ Hero section
- ✅ About, Projects, Contact sections
- ✅ Grid-based project cards
- ✅ Contact form with validation
- ✅ Footer
- ✅ Mobile navigation JavaScript

---

## Testing & Validation

### Responsive Testing

Test your site at these breakpoints:

:::{.callout-warning}
## Breakpoint Checklist
- **Mobile (320px)** - Text readable, no horizontal scroll
- **Tablet (768px)** - 2-column layouts work
- **Desktop (1024px+)** - Full layout visible
- **Large (1280px+)** - Max-width working
:::

**Browser DevTools:**
1. Open DevTools (F12)
2. Click Device Toggle (Ctrl+Shift+M)
3. Test at different screen sizes
4. Check touch interactions on mobile

### Performance Testing

```bash
# Check file sizes
du -sh css/
du -sh js/

# CSS Validation
# Visit: https://jigsaw.w3.org/css-validator/

# HTML Validation
# Visit: https://validator.w3.org/
```

### Accessibility Checklist

:::{.callout-tip}
## A11y Testing
- ✅ All images have alt text
- ✅ Color contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 (text)
- ✅ Keyboard navigation works
- ✅ Forms are properly labeled
- ✅ Focus states visible
- ✅ Semantic HTML used
:::

---

## Exercise 1: Create Advanced Selector Styles

**Task:** Create `css/advanced.css` with:

1. **Attribute selectors:**
   ```css
   input[type="email"] { /* Style email inputs */ }
   a[href^="https"] { /* External https links */ }
   ```

2. **Pseudo-classes:**
   ```css
   :nth-child(even) { /* Even items */ }
   :first-type { /* First of type */ }
   input:valid { /* Valid form input */ }
   ```

3. **Pseudo-elements:**
   ```css
   ::before /* Add content */ }
   ::after { /* Add content */ }
   ::selection { /* Highlight color */ }
   ```

**Submission:**
- [ ] File: `css/advanced.css`
- [ ] At least 10 advanced selectors
- [ ] Properly tested

---

## Exercise 2: Responsive Grid Variations

**Task:** Create three different grid layouts:

1. **2-Column layout** (desktop) → 1-column (mobile)
2. **3-Column layout** (desktop) → 2-column (tablet) → 1-column (mobile)
3. **4-Column layout** with auto-fit

**Code:**
```css
.grid-2 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr)); }
.grid-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); }
.grid-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); }
```

**Submission:**
- [ ] All three layouts working
- [ ] Tested at 3+ breakpoints
- [ ] Responsive images sized correctly

---

## Exercise 3: Form Validation Styling

**Task:** Create advanced form styling:

```html
<input type="email" required>
<input type="text" minlength="5">
<input type="password" pattern="[A-Za-z0-9]{8,}">
```

Style these states with CSS:
- `:valid` - Green border/checkmark
- `:invalid` - Red border/x
- `:focus` - Custom focus color
- `:disabled` - Grayed out

**Submission:**
- [ ] All input types tested
- [ ] Validation states visible
- [ ] Accessibility maintained

---

## Bonus Challenges

:::{.callout-success}
## Extra Credit (5 points each)
1. **Dark mode toggle:** Switch between light/dark themes
2. **Animated components:** Add smooth transitions/animations
3. **CSS animations:** Create keyframe animations for loaders
4. **Print stylesheet:** Create `css/print.css` for printing
5. **Font icon library:** Integrate Font Awesome icons
6. **CSS grid advanced:** Create complex grid layouts
7. **Flexbox mastery:** Build advanced flex layouts
8. **Performance:** Minify CSS and optimize styling
:::

### Dark Mode Implementation

```css
/* Light mode (default) */
:root {
    --bg: #ffffff;
    --text: #000000;
}

/* Dark mode */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    :root {
        --bg: #1f2937;
        --text: #f3f4f6;
    }
}

/* User toggle */
[data-theme="dark"] {
    --bg: #1f2937;
    --text: #f3f4f6;
}

body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
}
```

---

## Grading Rubric

| Criteria | Points | Excellent | Good | Fair | Poor |
|----------|--------|-----------|------|------|------|
| **HTML Structure** | 15 | Semantic, valid, accessible | Good structure | Basic structure | Invalid |
| **CSS Styling** | 20 | Professional, organized | Good styles | Limited styling | Minimal CSS |
| **Responsive Design** | 25 | Works all breakpoints | 2-3 breakpoints | One breakpoint | Not responsive |
| **Components** | 15 | 5+ styled components | 4 components | 2-3 components | 1 or fewer |
| **JavaScript Functionality** | 10 | Multi-feature JS | Working JS | Basic JS | No JS |
| **Testing & Validation** | 10 | Fully tested, validated | Mostly tested | Some testing | Not tested |
| **Code Quality** | 5 | Clean, documented | Good quality | Adequate | Poor structure |

**Total: 100 points**

---

## Submission Requirements

:::{.callout-note}
## What to Submit
1. **File Structure:**
   ```
   lab-3/
   ├── index.html
   ├── css/
   │   ├── reset.css
   │   ├── colors.css
   │   ├── layout.css
   │   ├── components.css
   │   ├── responsive.css
   │   └── style.css
   ├── js/
   │   ├── navbar.js
   │   └── form.js
   └── README.md
   ```

2. **README.md should include:**
   - Project description
   - Features implemented
   - How to run/test
   - Browser compatibility notes
   - Responsive breakpoints used

3. **Testing Report:**
   - Screenshot at 3 breakpoints
   - List of browsers tested
   - Validation results (HTML/CSS)

4. **Submission:**
   - Upload folder to course site
   - Due: **February 26, 2026 11:59 PM**
   - Format: ZIP file or GitHub repository link
:::

---

## Troubleshooting Guide

:::{.callout-warning}
## Common Issues
:::

### Issue: Responsive not working
**Fix:**
```html
<!-- Ensure viewport meta tag exists -->
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
```

### Issue: Grid layout not responsive
**Fix:**
```css
/* Use auto-fit instead of repeat(3, 1fr) */
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
```

### Issue: Images too large on mobile
**Fix:**
```css
img {
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
}
```

### Issue: Mobile menu not toggling
**Check JavaScript:**
```javascript
// Verify navToggle and navMenu exist
console.log(document.getElementById('navToggle'));
console.log(document.getElementById('navMenu'));
```

---

## Additional Resources

:::{.callout-tip}
## Learning Materials
- [MDN: CSS Media Queries](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Media_Queries)
- [MDN: CSS Grid](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_Grid_Layout)
- [MDN: Flexbox](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_Flexible_Box_Layout)
- [CSS-Tricks: Complete Guide to Grid](https://css-tricks.com/snippets/css/complete-guide-grid/)
- [MDN: Responsive Design](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/CSS/CSS_layout/Responsive_Design)
- [Can I Use](https://caniuse.com/) - Browser compatibility
- [WebAIM: Contrast Checker](https://webaim.org/resources/contrastchecker/)
:::

---

## FAQ

**Q: Do I need to use Bootstrap?**
A: No, this lab teaches you vanilla CSS. You can use Bootstrap concepts but code from scratch.

**Q: What about older browser support?**
A: Focus on modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). Use fallbacks only if required.

**Q: Can I use Sass/SCSS?**
A: Yes! Compile to CSS and submit the CSS files.

**Q: How do I host this online?**
A: Use GitHub Pages, Netlify, or Vercel (covered in Week 4).
